name: Kid's Choice Turkey Quesadilla (Hl)
recipeIngredient: 5 ounces low sodium jack cheese, shredded
5 ounces herb roasted turkey, sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a non-stick saute pan and lightly spray with low-fat olive oil.
2. Place the tortilla in the pan on one half and sprinkle half of the jack cheese.
3. Layer turkey slices on top and add the remaining cheese.
4. Fold over the tortilla and press down firmly with a metal spatula.
5. Cook until lightly browned, about 3 minutes.
6. Turn the quesadilla and cook until browned on both sides.
7. Transfer to a chopping surface and cut into three triangles.
8. Serve with approximately 2 tablespoons of jicama slaw and tropical salsa.
Yield: 1 serving
